title: Network Detective 🕵️
description: Analyze a complex network scan and identify the primary attack vector.

tasks.title: Analyze the Scan Result
tasks.description: Look at the nmap output and find the most dangerous open port.

tasks.title: Recommend a Fix
tasks.description: Choose the best defensive action to take.

content.problemStatement:
You are a Junior Security Analyst. You have just completed an internal nmap scan of a development server. The results are as follows:

```text
PORT     STATE SERVICE VERSION
21/tcp   open  ftp     vsftpd 2.3.4
22/tcp   open  ssh     OpenSSH 7.2p2
80/tcp   open  http    Apache httpd 2.4.18
3306/tcp open  mysql   MySQL 5.7.12
```

**History**: A quick search in the CVE database reveals that `vsftpd 2.3.4` contains a famous 'Backdoor' vulnerability that allows immediate command execution.

**Your Mission**:
1. Identify the most critical port to close/patch.
2. Suggest the firewall command to block it for now.
